title: Istio Gateway
description: A Gateway describes a load balancer operating at the edge of the mesh receiving incoming or outgoing HTTP/TCP connections. The specification describes a set of ports that should be exposed, the type of protocol to use, SNI configuration for the load balancer, etc.

selector.description: One or more labels that indicate a specific set of pods/VMs on which this gateway configuration should be applied. By default workloads are searched across all namespaces.

port.description: The port on which the proxy should listen for incoming connections.

number.description: A valid non-negative integer port number.

protocol.description: The protocol exposed on the port. Must be one of HTTP, HTTPS, GRPC, HTTP2, MONGO, TCP, TLS.

targetPort.description: The port number on the endpoint where traffic will be received.

bind.description: The IP address or Unix domain socket to which the listener should be bound.

hosts.description: One or more hosts exposed by this gateway. Supports namespace/dnsName format for restricting to specific namespaces.

tls.description: Set of TLS related options that govern the server's behavior.

httpsRedirect.description: If true, the load balancer will send a 301 redirect for all HTTP connections.

mode.description: Controls whether a TLS connection is terminated at the gateway or passed through.

serverCertificate.description: Path to the file holding the server-side TLS certificate.

privateKey.description: Path to the file holding the server's private key.

caCertificates.description: Path to a file containing certificate authority certificates for verifying client certificates.

credentialName.description: The name of the secret that holds the TLS certs.

subjectAltNames.description: A list of alternate names to verify the subject identity in the certificate.

cipherSuites.description: List of cipher suites to use for TLS connections.

name.description: An optional name of the server, used for identifying the server in VirtualService host matching.
